fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the language that is used when translating specified text on documents to foreign business partner, such as an item description on an order confirmation.

fields.name: Salutation Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the salutation is formal or informal. Make your selection by clicking the field.

fields.name: Name 1
fields.tooltip: Specifies a salutation. The options are: Job Title, First Name, Middle Name, Surname, Initials and Company Name.

fields.name: Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies a salutation. The options are: Job Title, First Name, Middle Name, Surname, Initials and Company Name.

fields.tooltip: Specifies a salutation. The options are: Job Title, First Name, Middle Name, Surname, Initials and Company Name.
